classifications.phrase: continuing monetary support that the economy needs
economic recovery in Australia is stronger than earlier expected
labour market has continued to recover faster than expected
inflation and wage outcomes remain subdued
pick-up in inflation and wages growth is expected, it is likely to be only gradual…
remain some distance from the inflation and employment objectives
stronger-than-expected economic recovery and the improved outlook
will not increase the cash rate until actual inflation is sustainably within the 2 to…
this condition will not be met before 2024

payload.rationale: The statement signals a dovish overall stance, emphasizing subdued inflation and wages despite strong recovery, with explicit forward guidance that rates will remain low until inflation sustainably reaches target, expected not before 2024.
